subcodes.first_line: From the beginning of existence until the Promised Day men retained superiority over women in every respect.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو ورقه مقبله موقنه از بدو وجود تا یوم موعود رجال تفوق بر نساء در جمیع
subcodes.subjects: @role and station of women, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation
